basecall.help_text: Enable basecalling from raw signal input (POD5/FAST5). Set to false when providing pre-basecalled FASTQ input via fastq_dir.

basecall_model.help_text: Basecalling model. Required when basecall=true; ignored when basecall=false.

trim_adapters.help_text: Default behavior: any detected adapters or primers will be trimmed.

barcode_kit_name.help_text: Barcode kit used for multiplexing samples.

dorado_local_path.help_text: Path to local Dorado binary, if used.

raw_read_dir.help_text: Directory containing raw reads (POD5/FAST5). Required when basecall=true.

fastq_dir.help_text: Directory containing pre-basecalled FASTQ files under barcode subdirectories. Required when basecall=false.

save_fastqs.help_text: Save basecalled reads in FASTQ format.

save_too_short.help_text: Save reads that are too short.

save_too_long.help_text: Save reads that are too long.

cutadapt_args.help_text: Parameters for Cutadapt to trim adapters with specific error tolerance and overlap requirements.

coverage_reporting_thresholds.help_text: Coverage (per-amplicon locus read depth) thresholds for reporting.

multiqc_config.help_text: Path to MultiQC configuration file. Leave blank to use default.

reference.help_text: Path to the reference genome file. (mandatory)

primers.help_text: Path to the primer sequences file. (mandatory)

target_regions_bed.help_text: Path to the BED file with target regions. (mandatory)

additional_metadata.help_text: Path to metadata linking samples to barcodes. (mandatory)

clair3_model.help_text: Path to the Clair3 model for variant calling. (mandatory)

raxml_base_model.help_text: Base model used by RAxML-NG for phylogenetic analysis; ascertainment bias correction may be added if using SNP-restricted alignment.

masking_quality.help_text: Quality score minimum for masking. Scores below this will be replaced with N.

queue_size.help_text: Maximum number of jobs in the queue.

monochrome_logs.help_text: Logs will not be in monochrome.
